title: hieracium extracticaule
intro: Hieracium extracticaule is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family known for its medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce blood pressure and improve digestion. The health benefits of Hieracium extracticaule include its potential to aid in weight loss, lower cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
